# ============================================
# Makefile — RISC-V RV32I Simulation
# Tool: QuestaSim (Windows path — adjust if needed)
# Usage:
#   make sim     → compile and simulate
#   make wave    → open waveform in QuestaSim
#   make clean   → remove generated files
# ============================================

# QuestaSim executable path (Windows)
VLOG  = vlog
VSIM  = vsim

# Source files — order matters (bottom-up)
RTL_FILES = \
    ../rtl/alu.v \
    ../rtl/register_file.v \
    ../rtl/pc.v \
    ../rtl/instr_mem.v \
    ../rtl/data_mem.v \
    ../rtl/hazard_unit.v \
    ../rtl/forwarding_unit.v \
    ../rtl/if_stage.v \
    ../rtl/id_stage.v \
    ../rtl/ex_stage.v \
    ../rtl/mem_stage.v \
    ../rtl/wb_stage.v \
    ../rtl/riscv_top.v \
    ../tb/riscv_tb.v

# Default target
all: sim

# Step 1: Compile all RTL and testbench
compile:
	$(VLOG) $(RTL_FILES)

# Step 2: Run simulation
sim: compile
	$(VSIM) -c riscv_tb \
	    -do "run -all; quit" \
	    | tee sim_log.txt

# Step 3: Open waveform GUI
wave: compile
	$(VSIM) riscv_tb \
	    -do "add wave -r /*; run -all"

# Clean generated files
clean:
	rm -f *.vcd *.wlf sim_log.txt
	rm -rf work/

.PHONY: all compile sim wave clean
